q : Stmt Bool Λ' σ

T : Tape Bool
⊢ (match move d q, v, T with
    | Stmt.move d q, v, T => stepAux q v (Tape.move d T)
    | Stmt.write a q, v, T => stepAux q v (Tape.write (a T.head v) T)
    | Stmt.load s q, v, T => stepAux q (s T.head v) T
    | Stmt.branch p q₁ q₂, v, T => bif p T.head v then stepAux q₁ v T else stepAux q₂ v T
    | Stmt.goto l, v, T => { l := some (l T.head v), var := v, Tape := T }
    | Stmt.halt, v, T => { l := none, var := v, Tape := T }) =
    match q, v, (Tape.move d)^[n] T with
    | Stmt.move d q, v, T => stepAux q v (Tape.move d T)
    | Stmt.write a q, v, T => stepAux q v (Tape.write (a T.head v) T)
    | Stmt.load s q, v, T => stepAux q (s T.head v) T
    | Stmt.branch p q₁ q₂, v, T => bif p T.head v then stepAux q₁ v T else stepAux q₂ v T
    | Stmt.goto l, v, T => { l := some (l T.head v), var := v, Tape := T }
    | Stmt.halt, v, T => { l := none, var := v, Tape := T }
